item.title: everything important was invented by the irish
item.dc:creator: absinthemindedprofessor

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1365 (solving a rat problem)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "whatdoing? Peekaboo!" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride

item.title: I have too many memes: Dump #111
item.description:
What is this meant to be? I don’t know anything about MLK and I can’t imagine how that would help this
This was about Avatar 2
These are some reasons that octopodes are my favourite animal
I’m sure this is a Snapchat filter but ‘they look like purge masks’ is something I now think of when I see my sister watching real housewives
I want to do this cause Drake sucks but I cannot find a good consensus on what counts as a burpee
It’s difficult to compare yourself to others cause there’s too many factors you can’t account for Compare yourself to yourself, and the only metric that matters is if you tried or not :)
item.dc:creator: Sweenerd

item.title: I Make Realistic River Steamboat Pictures In a Forest Stream. NO AI!
item.description:
For this huge LEGO River Steamboat I needed a big background and the water was really important element. So I took my ironing board, sat up the height which fit to the water level, and placed the boat on it. In the beautiful sunset lights I created some moody Mississippi vibe images! :)) For more of my works check my Insta page: https://www.instagram.com/benedek.lampert/
For more of my works check my Insta page: https://www.instagram.com/benedek.lampert/
For more of my works check my Insta page: https://www.instagram.com/benedek.lampert/
For more of my works check my Insta page: https://www.instagram.com/benedek.lampert/

This made me laugh so much. I’ve watched it over and over. Had to be first.
Send this to someone who needs a hug
Maybe if Trump saw this episode he’d understand? Nah…he’d still be evil.
Damn it, Jim. I mean Imgur.
I loved this call back

item.title: What Happened Today #108
item.description: Even on a quiet Sunday, the machinery of power grinds forward. Trump's budget bill advances behind closed-door deals while Americans form a 30-mile human chain of resistance spanning Chicago suburbs. Meanwhile, as Biden faces a devastating cancer diagnosis, Iran defies Trump's nuclear demands, showing how personal and geopolitical stakes remain high regardless of the news cycle's volume. Don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage of https://www.govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/joe-biden-cancer 2. https://go.govbrief.today/iran-nuclear-enrichment 3. https://go.govbrief.today/house-gets-budget-bill 4. https://go.govbrief.today/bessent-walmart-prices 5. https://go.govbrief.today/hands-across-chicagoland Yesterday's Top Link: https://go.govbrief.today/oklahoma-schools-misinformation
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
